gaps.title: 98 .mjs files still to migrate to TypeScript (72 already `@ts-check`'d)
gaps.evidence: git ls-files '*.mjs' = 98; concentrated in scripts (31), bin/host-bridge/tools (19), bin/host-bridge (12); in-place @ts-check progress 72/98
gaps.justification: TS is the primary language (type-safety, single toolchain); un-migrated .mjs escapes tsc + the shared type contracts.

gaps.title: Backend route `/api/ready` is never called by the frontend
gaps.evidence: server route with no matching src /api call
gaps.justification: Dead route = maintenance cost + attack surface; confirm intentional (public API?) or remove.
